policies.name: Egress
policies.description: PF firewall validation, outbound blocking, Unix domain socket enforcement

policies.name: Determinism
policies.description: Kernel hash verification, RNG seeding, replay validation
policies.enforcement_point: kernel loading, execution start, replay verification

policies.name: Router
policies.description: K-sparse routing, Q15 quantization, entropy floor, deterministic tie-breaking

policies.name: Evidence
policies.description: Evidence span requirements, open-book enforcement

policies.name: Refusal
policies.description: Abstention on low confidence, insufficient evidence, missing fields

policies.name: Numeric
policies.description: Unit normalization, numeric sanity checks, epsilon tracking

policies.name: RAG
policies.description: Per-tenant index isolation, deterministic retrieval ordering, embedding hash verification

policies.name: Isolation
policies.description: Process per tenant, UID/GID separation, capability-scoped paths

policies.name: Telemetry
policies.description: Canonical JSON events, sampling rules, BLAKE3 hashing, bundle rotation

policies.name: Retention
policies.description: Bundle retention policies, CPID-based retention, incident preservation

policies.name: Performance
policies.description: Latency budgets (p95 < 24ms), router overhead thresholds, throughput gates

policies.name: Memory
policies.description: 15% headroom requirement, eviction order, K reduction before evict

policies.name: Artifacts
policies.description: Ed25519 signature verification, SBOM validation, CAS-only loading

policies.name: Secrets
policies.description: Secure Enclave KEK management, envelope encryption, no env var secrets

policies.name: Build/Release
policies.description: Toolchain pinning, kernel hash verification, hallucination thresholds, signed plans

policies.name: Compliance
policies.description: Control matrix mapping, evidence linking, ITAR suite verification

policies.name: Incident
policies.description: Runbook procedures for memory/router/determinism/violation incidents

policies.name: Output
policies.description: JSON format enforcement, trace requirements, forbidden topic filters

policies.name: Adapters
policies.description: Activation thresholds, quality delta requirements, registry admission

policies.name: Deterministic I/O
policies.description: Hashed file wrappers, no wall-clock timestamps, stubbed network in strict mode

registry_structure.trait_definition: pub trait Policy { fn enforce(&self, ctx: &Context) -> Result<Audit, Violation>; }
